name: Warm Bean and Tomato Salad with Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Balsamic Vinegar or Red Wine Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the ends from the green beans and cut into 1-inch lengths.
2. Cook in boiling water until just tender, about 5-7 minutes. Drain well.
3. Heat one tablespoon of olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
4. Cook the shallots until softened, about 2 minutes.
5. Add balsamic vinegar and cook until the liquid is reduced.
6. Stir in the chickpeas and green beans; cook until heated through, about 2 minutes.
7. In a serving bowl, combine the bean mixture with tomatoes, olives, and basil.
8. Whisk together the remaining olive oil with lemon juice and pour over the salad.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Serve warm or at room temperature. Serves 2 as main course, 4 as side dish.
